invalid_auth.message: The provided access key and secret key are invalid.

server_error.message: Received internal server error from Scaleway.

error.invalid_auth: The provided access key and secret key are invalid.
error.server_error: Received internal server error from Scaleway.

data_description.bucket: Bucket must already exist and be writable using the provided credentials. [See Scaleway docs.](https://www.scaleway.com/docs/object-storage/how-to/create-a-bucket/)
data_description.object_prefix: A prefix that will be added to every object key.

credentials.name: Credentials
credentials.description: Provide credentials to access the Scaleway API. [See Scaleway docs.](https://www.scaleway.com/docs/iam/api-cli/using-api-key-object-storage/)

reauth.title: Re-authenticate Scaleway Object Storage bucket
reauth.description: Your [Scaleway credentials](https://www.scaleway.com/docs/iam/api-cli/using-api-key-object-storage/) for the `{bucket_name}` bucket are no longer valid. Please enter new, valid credentials.
